author: Joel Ponukumatla
name: 11L XSA + Int6 QAT + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + SWA + FA3
blurb: Combines PR #198 base (11L SmearGate BigramHash OrthoInit WD=0.04 SWA FA3) with XSA on last 3 layers (PR #265, arXiv:2603.09078) and Int6 STE QAT (PR #194). XSA removes self-attention bias in deep layers; QAT closes the 0.011 BPB post-quant gap. No prior PR has combined all three.
